title: Subquery in IN clause causes incorrect row duplication
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)
```
CREATE TABLE t0 (c1 BLOB);
INSERT INTO t0 (c1) VALUES ('gO');
INSERT INTO t0 (c1) VALUES ('W');
SELECT t0.c1  FROM t0 WHERE ((((0) IN (SELECT t0.c1 AS ca5 FROM t0))));
```
### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)
```
+------------+
| c1         |
+------------+
| 0x674F     |
| 0x57       |
+------------+
```
### 3. What did you see instead (Required)
```
mysql> SELECT t0.c1  FROM t0 WHERE ((((0) IN (SELECT t0.c1 AS ca5 FROM t0))));
+------------+
| c1         |
+------------+
| 0x674F     |
| 0x674F     |
| 0x57       |
| 0x57       |
+------------+
4 rows in set, 2 warnings (0.00 sec)
```
### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->

 Release Version: v8.5.0-20251010-ec6b882
Edition: Community
Git Commit Hash: ec6b882d188f77c199907ba26843a872b8c5fd6d

UTC Build Time: 2025-10-10 10:21:51
GoVersion: go1.23.3
Race Enabled: false

Store: unistore
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (c1 INT, c2 VARCHAR(10), c3 BYTEA);
INSERT INTO t1 (c1, c2, c3) VALUES (1, 'test', decode('6461746131', 'hex'));
INSERT INTO t1 (c1, c2, c3) VALUES (2, 'example', decode('6461746132', 'hex'));
SELECT t1.c2 FROM t1 WHERE (1 IN (SELECT t1.c1 FROM t1 WHERE t1.c2 IS NOT NULL));
SELECT t1.c3 FROM t1 WHERE (0 IN (SELECT t1.c1 FROM t1 WHERE t1.c3 IS NULL));
key_bug_features: Subquery in IN clause causing row duplication
